allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('dist/Navigator_Base_v2.0.txt','utf8'\)\); const h=d.handlers.find\(h=>h.filter.slotKey==='-5'\); const lines=h.code.split\('\\n'\); console.log\('Total lines:', lines.length\); lines.slice\(498,512\).forEach\(\(l,i\)=>console.log\(499+i+':', l\)\);")
